items.claim: Mitch Ramirez's submission defense has not been tested against anything other than rear-naked chokes.
items.quote: we haven't seen Mitch Ramirez's submission defense tested against anything other than a rear naked joke.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez cannot withstand Chase Hooper's takedowns and grappling.
items.quote: They're trying to give the man someone who cannot really withstand the takedowns and the grappling.

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci is not particularly great in any specific area of fighting.
items.quote: she's not particularly great in any area.

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci has almost no finishing upside.
items.quote: she has next to zero finishing upside.

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci struggles when fighting against specialists.
items.quote: if she goes against any type of specialist, she struggles.

items.claim: Fatima Klein has higher finishing upside than Tabitha Ricci.
items.quote: I think Fatima Mle Klein has a lot much higher finishing upside

items.claim: Fatima Klein is a more well-rounded fighter than Tabitha Ricci.
items.quote: I think she is the more you know well-rounded fighter.
